memberdef.argsstring: (void *UsbInstance, u8 EndpointNo, u8 dir, u32 Type)
memberdef.name: EpConfigure

memberdef.argsstring: (void *InstancePtr, u8 Epnum, u8 Dir, void(*Handler)(void *, u32, u32))
memberdef.name: SetEpHandler

memberdef.argsstring: (void *InstancePtr, u8 UsbEpNum, u8 Dir, u16 Maxsize, u8 Type)
memberdef.name: EpEnable

briefdescription.para: Handler called from polled mode for handling usb events.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsbPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: Enables the events specified in the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsbPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets speed of the Core for connecting to Host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Usb_DevData instance.
is a private member of Usb_DevData instance.
is a private member of Usb_DevData instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *InstancePtr, u8 UsbEpNum, u8 Dir, u32 Interval)
memberdef.name: SetEpInterval

parameterdescription.para: is a private member of Usb_DevData instance.
is the data transfer service interval

briefdescription.para: This file contains implementation of USBPSU Driver wrappers.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 BK 12/01/18 First release MYK 12/01/18 Added hibernation support for device mode vak 13/03/18 Moved the setup interrupt system calls from driver to example. 1.5 vak 02/06/19 Modified the code to add UsbPollHandler and UsbEnableEvent API's vak 02/07/19 Modified the code to issue XUsbPsu_Ep0StallRestart() for Endpoint Zero 1.14 pm 21/06/23 Added support for system device-tree flow.
